title: EU Cloud vs US Giants: A New European Cloud Option? #shorts
summary: Major cloud providers are expanding data centers across Europe, raising questions about building an EU-based cloud alternative to reduce dependency on US giants. The video frames this as part of a broader debate on European digital sovereignty and infrastructure independence.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof looks at the expansion of major cloud providers' data centers across Europe and asks whether an EU-based cloud alternative could reduce dependency on US giants. It frames the question within the wider debate over European digital sovereignty and infrastructure independence. The discussion touches on virtualization, data centers, and digital identity as elements of that debate.
